top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN e.event_name LIKE '%Community Service%' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM event e
WHERE e.event_date BETWEEN '2019-01-01' AND '2019-12-31'
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 
      FROM attendance a 
      JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id 
      WHERE a.link_to_event = e.event_id 
        AND m.position = 'Student_Club'
  );

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN LOWER(e.event_name) LIKE '%community service%' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM event e
JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', e.event_date) = '2019'
AND m.position = 'Student_Club';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN e.event_name LIKE '%Community Service%' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM event e
WHERE e.event_date BETWEEN '2019-01-01' AND '2019-12-31'
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 
      FROM attendance a 
      JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id 
      WHERE a.link_to_event = e.event_id 
        AND m.position = 'Student_Club'
  );

SELECT 
    ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN e.event_name LIKE '%Community Service%' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM event e
WHERE e.event_date >= '2019-01-01' 
  AND e.event_date <= '2019-12-31'
  AND e.event_id IN (
      SELECT a.link_to_event 
      FROM attendance a
      JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
      WHERE m.position = 'Student_Club'
  );

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN LOWER(e.event_name) LIKE '%community service%' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM event e
JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', e.event_date) = '2019'
AND m.position = 'Student_Club';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN e.event_name LIKE '%Community Service%' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM event e
WHERE e.event_date BETWEEN '2019-01-01' AND '2019-12-31'
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 
      FROM attendance a 
      JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id 
      WHERE a.link_to_event = e.event_id 
        AND m.position = 'Student_Club'
  );

SELECT 
    ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN e.event_name LIKE '%Community Service%' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM event e
WHERE e.event_date >= '2019-01-01' 
  AND e.event_date <= '2019-12-31'
  AND e.event_id IN (
      SELECT a.link_to_event 
      FROM attendance a
      JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
      WHERE m.position = 'Student_Club'
  );

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        COUNT(CASE WHEN LOWER(e.event_name) LIKE '%community service%' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 
        / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 
        2
    ) AS percentage
FROM event e
WHERE e.event_date LIKE '2019-%'
AND e.event_id IN (
    SELECT a.link_to_event 
    FROM attendance a
    INNER JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
    WHERE m.position = 'Student_Club'
);

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN e.event_name LIKE '%Community Service%' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM event e
WHERE e.event_date BETWEEN '2019-01-01' AND '2019-12-31'
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 
      FROM attendance a 
      JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id 
      WHERE a.link_to_event = e.event_id 
        AND m.position = 'Student_Club'
  );
